script_text: In a story, each character has their own way of seeing things.
That is called their point of view.
Two characters can see the same thing very differently!
Tom loves the park. He thinks it is the best place ever!
Lea feels lonely at the park. She wishes her friend was there.
Same park, two very different points of view!
A character's point of view comes from what they feel and want.
Listen to what they say. Watch what they do.
Those are clues to their point of view!
Imagine you are the character. How would you feel?
Now you are ready to see different points of view!
